<!--
A work item is a normal issue that a running fkst session consumes. To route it to
a session, add that session's Work Label (from its `### Work Label` section) to
this issue. While an open issue carries that label, the session stays active and
works it; the session idles out once none remain.

Do NOT put secrets, tokens, or credentials in this issue.
-->
